LX SIXTY

GROUP

Building enduring businesses.

About

A holding company for
the long term.

LX Sixty is a diversified group building and investing in businesses across hospitality, luxury travel, and emerging sectors. Founded with a clear conviction that patient capital and operational excellence create lasting value, we take a principal-led approach to every venture in our portfolio.

The name carries purpose. LX is the Roman numeral for sixty — a number that represents cycles, completeness, and the patience to see things through. We build with decades in mind, not quarters.

3 Portfolio Companies
2 Active Sectors
UK Headquartered
Portfolio

Our Companies

01

Project Sixty

Hospitality

A hospitality concept delivering elevated food and beverage experiences. Project Sixty blends quality with character, creating spaces where every detail is considered and every visit is memorable.

Active
02

ProLuxe Travel

Luxury Travel

A luxury travel consultancy curating bespoke itineraries for discerning travellers. ProLuxe Travel combines deep destination knowledge with white-glove service to craft journeys beyond the ordinary.

Active
03

Future Ventures

Emerging Sectors

LX Sixty is actively evaluating opportunities across technology, wellness, and lifestyle sectors. Our pipeline reflects a disciplined approach to growth — expanding only where we can add genuine value.

Pipeline
Leadership

Principal-Led

ML

Myles Longfield

Founder & CEO

Myles founded LX Sixty with the belief that the best businesses are built with patience, precision, and a long-term perspective. He leads the group's strategic direction and is hands-on across every portfolio company, from concept development to operational execution.

With experience spanning hospitality and luxury services, Myles brings an operator's mindset to every investment decision — ensuring that each venture under the LX Sixty umbrella meets the group's exacting standards.

Contact

Get in Touch

For partnership enquiries, investment discussions, or general information about LX Sixty and our portfolio companies.
